hooks.command: jq -r --arg msg 'Editing a .java file — follow the Java gate in .claude/rules/java.md: (1) Phase 0 branch setup (branch type/khactuong.ngohoang/... from an updated base); (2) self-explanatory code, NO comments except public Javadoc; (3) tests are mandatory (regression test for bug fixes); (4) run the code-review + security-review gate before commit.' 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "" | endswith(".java")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$msg}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r --arg msg 'Just edited a .java file — before committing, run the post-change gate (see .claude/rules/java.md): (1) run the affected unit/integration tests and ensure they pass (regression test for bug fixes); (2) run code-review (null safety, exceptions, correctness); (3) run security-review if input handling / queries / auth changed; (4) then commit via the commit skill with the issue key in the footer.' 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // "") | endswith(".java")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$msg}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
